option.name: SCRIPT_TEXT
option.value: python3 scripts/run-skill-ab-suite.py --continue-on-failure --ambient-goose --max-workers 5 --goose-cli "/home/jmercier/Codes/third-parties/goose/target/debug/goose" && python3 scripts/run-harness-ab-suite.py --kind recipes --continue-on-failure --ambient-goose --max-workers 5 --goose-cli "/home/jmercier/Codes/third-parties/goose/target/debug/goose" && python3 scripts/run-harness-ab-suite.py --kind agents --continue-on-failure --ambient-goose --max-workers 5 --goose-cli "/home/jmercier/Codes/third-parties/goose/target/debug/goose"
